Latifa bint Mohammed concludes an official visit to Sweden, leading a high level delegation of ministers and senior officials. The visit offered opportunities to exchange expertise, explore innovative initiatives, and engage with leading figures and changemakers.

RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: During my visit to the Nobel Prize Museum, I took some time to reflect on the inspiring stories of individuals who believed in their ideas and pursued knowledge with determination. Their achievements extended far beyond their own countries and made meaningful contributions to humanity. These stories remind us that every great achievement begins with an idea, and that investing in knowledge and empowering young minds remain among the most important foundations for building the future and creating lasting positive impact.
